metadata.title: Davide Avagnano — Software Engineer
metadata.description: Davide Avagnano, freelance software engineer. I build accessible, scalable, high-performance web applications with React and the Next.js ecosystem.

hero.role: I build and maintain end-to-end production systems with TypeScript, React, Next.js and Node.js on PostgreSQL.
hero.intro: I've contributed to high-volume platforms and built a complete SaaS on my own. My center of gravity is the backend: data modeling, type-safe APIs, async workers, security and deployment.

sections.profile: Who I am and how I work — from aerospace engineering to a backend-heavy focus.
sections.path: The journey timeline: education, self-taught, freelance since 2025.
sections.skills: Languages, frontend, backend, database, infrastructure and integrations — by category.
sections.projects: Real case studies grouped by type: SaaS, data & performance marketing, infra & security.
sections.contact: Let's work together: tell me about your project and I'll get back to you.

footer.tagline: Freelance fullstack developer. End-to-end production systems.
